title: City Of Our God

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: In the city of our God
Where His holy mountain stands
Glory shines from dawn to dusk
Over all these promised lands
Ancient walls and towers rise
Testament to Heaven's might
Here our fathers stood in awe
Of His presence day and night

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Great is the Lord, mighty and true
In the city where His praises ring
From Zion's heights to morning dew
Great is our God, forever King

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Kings assembled at her gates
Trembled at the sight they saw
Fled in wonder and dismay
From His power and His law
For no earthly force compares
To our fortress and our shield
In His temple we have known
All the grace that love can yield

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Great is the Lord, mighty and true
In the city where His praises ring
From Zion's heights to morning dew
Great is our God, forever King

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Walk around these ancient walls
Count the towers standing tall
Tell the generations yet to come
How His mercy saved us all
How His mercy saved us all

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Let the mountains rise in joy
Let the people celebrate
For our God will guide us home
Past the final golden gate
Through the ages He remains
Faithful to His holy throne
In His city we proclaim
Love that makes His glory known

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Great is the Lord, mighty and true
In the city where His praises ring
From Zion's heights to morning dew
Great is our God, forever King

sections.label: Outro
lines: Great is the Lord
Forever King
His praise will ring
For endless days
Suggested Titles:
1. "Great Is the Lord (City of Our God)"
2. "Zion's Song"
3. "Forever King"
4. "The City of Grace"
5. "Ancient Walls"

epigraph: and greatly to be praised in the city of our God
